name: hope
description: Use a growing AI work harness to understand GitHub pull requests and safely clean up files created by Hope.

interface.shortDescription: Understand PRs and clean Hope files
interface.longDescription: Hope is a small AI work harness. It creates a private offline review for a GitHub pull request and safely previews and removes managed Hope files after confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Use $hope:diff to explain the latest PR in this repository. I will provide a URL when I need another PR.
Use $hope:cleanup to preview local files managed by Hope and remove only the items I confirm.
